titleStmt.title: SII 39.88: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 88. (A.R. No. 88 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌLANATHA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KŌṈĒRIṈMAIKOṆḌĀṈ-13TH YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription is a kings order to restore the right of Śivabrāhmaṇa to receive his share of food in the temple as per the document of the kings brother-in-law Aḻagapperumāḷ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrīśtribhuvaṉa cakkaravatti
koṉeriṉmai koṇṭā
ṉ tirukkoḷakkuṭi śivadharmmiśvara mu
ṭaiya nāyaṉār koyillil śivabrā
hmaṇaril Āgastyagotrattu Iṉpaṉ
Uñcāṉāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyapaṭṭaṉukku tā
ṉ maccuṉaṉār Aḻakapperumāḷ Olaippa
ṭi Ikkoyiṟ tirukkāmakkoṭṭattu Āḷuṭai
ya nācciyār koyilile nāṉāḻi Ariciccoṟu
peṟṟu vantāḷuṉākavum Avaṟkuppiṉpu Ikkoyi(l) tāṉa
ttār Itatait tavirttārkaḷākavum tamiḻapallavata
raiyaṉ collukaiyāle maccuṉaṉār Olaippa
tāṉ Ikkoyilil peṟṟu vanta nāṉāḻi Aricic co
ṟum taṉakkum taṉvaṟka(t)tāṟkkum cantirātittavaṟ
celvatāka Ikko(yi)ṟ tāṉa(t)tāṟkku taṭiolai poti kā
ṭṭac (co)ṉṉom tāṉ muṉpu peṟṟu vantapaṭiye
koḷka Ivai teṉṉavataraiyaṉ Eḻut
tuḥ yāṇṭu 10 3 nāḷ 2 100 3 Ivai
ttarājaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai pallavarā
jaṉ Eḻuttu śrīmāheśvarara
kṣaiḥ
Digital edition of SII 39.88 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
